name: Integration seed harness does not populate identity-v2 tables → flag-on integration suites systemically red
description: The 'Flag-ON integration (IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED)' CI check fails systemically (20+ integration suites red) because the shared integration seed harness seeds only legacy tables, not the identity-v2 graph the flag-on read paths require.
acceptanceCriteria: ROOT CAUSE: tests/integration shared seed harness (helpers.ts / route-fixtures.ts) seeds only legacy tables (profiles/subscriptions), not the identity-v2 graph (person/login + membership/guardianship edges + subscription-v2). Post-WI-867 flag collapse, v2 reads are unconditional, so the REQUIRED 'main' integration job (runs flag-off env) now hits empty v2 reads -> 33 suites / 208 tests fail. FIX: extend the seed harness to DUAL-SEED the v2 graph alongside the legacy seed (do NOT revert product code — prod reads v2 correctly; the gap is the test seed). VARIANTS/BUCKETS that must clear (from the WI-867 PR#1591 distribution): (a) 216 createProfileViaRoute-not-found + 20 Profile-row-missing -> person+profile seeded into v2; (b) 22 validateGuardianshipEdgeV2 Forbidden -> guardianship edge seeded; (c) subscription tier undefined/Zod -> subscription-v2 seeded with a valid tier; (d) 2 TypeErrors (pronouns/conversationLanguage off undefined profile) -> resolve once v2 profile reads succeed. DONE: both the required 'main' integration job AND the advisory 'Flag-ON integration' lane go green in CI; verified locally first. Gets its own review+QA; not folded into WI-867.
riskImpact: Test-infra only; no production code change. Fix unblocks the required main integration check post-WI-867 collapse. Mis-seeding risk: an incorrect v2 seed could mask a real product bug — mitigated by verifying against the captured 208-failure bucket distribution (each bucket must clear for the documented reason).
